prompt: Photojournalistic documentary photograph, Canon EOS R5, 24mm wide-angle lens, f/4.0, ISO 250. The BEGINNING of a sacred Brazilian benzeção ceremony. Very wide cinematic 16:9 environmental shot from approximately 7 meters distance. Both women at full body occupy about 40 percent of frame height, surrounded by lush tropical garden. Gislaine the healer stands behind a seated woman in a clearing among tall palm trees at golden hour. Gislaine holds fresh arruda and rosemary herbs raised high above the woman's head with right hand, left hand on her own heart, eyes closed in opening prayer. She wears colorful crocheted rainbow poncho with V-shaped stripes pink green blue yellow red purple white with tassels, white turban with golden band and turquoise stone, cowrie bracelet. The RECEIVING WOMAN: young Brazilian woman 30 years old, straight medium-length dark brown hair parted in middle past shoulders, light olive skin, oval face, slim build, simple long white cotton dress thin straps, barefoot on grass, sitting cross-legged, eyes closed, hands on knees palms up. Herbs have not touched her yet. Green grass foreground, two women middle ground, tall palm trees and tropical plants background, golden hour sunlight filtering through canopy from behind. Real natural light, imperfect grass, fallen leaves. No effects. Raw documentary realism for video production.
negative_prompt: close-up, medium shot, tight crop, cropped bodies, digital effects, particles, glowing, CGI, illustration, cartoon, anime, AI look, skin smoothing, plastic skin, studio lighting, flash, indoor, blonde hair, curly hair, smoke, fog, extra fingers, deformed hands

settings.style: raw photojournalism, very wide cinematic shot, video-ready
settings.lighting: real golden hour backlighting through palms
